zh.of, New Castile, Spain: 西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mencia García de Sotomayor於大約1270年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，她的父親García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"34歲，母親Ines La Gordo de Toledo40歲。她和Fernan Perez de Barroso至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世在西班牙。

zh-hans.of, New Castile, Spain: 西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mencia García de Sotomayor于大约1270年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，她的父亲García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"34岁，母亲Ines La Gordo de Toledo40岁。她和Fernan Perez de Barroso至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sotomayor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Luis, Miguel, Manuel, Jorge, Jose, Orlando, Rafael, Raul, Javier, Lourdes.

Spanish: Castilianized form of a habitational name from either of two places in Pontevedra and Ourense provinces, Galicia, named Soutomaior, from Galician souto ‘grove, small wood’ + maior ‘larger, main’.

nameMeanings.name: Mencia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: elaboration of   Mercy  , coinciding in form with the name of the Anglo-Saxon kingdom of Mercia, which dominated England during the 8th century under its king, Offa.

nameMeanings.name: García
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

variants.name: Marsha
meanings: Phonetic spelling of   Marcia  , associated particularly with the American film star  Marsha Hunt  (  b. 1917 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mencia García de Sotomayor was born about 1270, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, her father, García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR", was 34 and her mother, Ines La Gordo de Toledo, was 40. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Fernan Perez de Barroso. She died in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mencia García de Sotomayor est née environ 1270, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR", avait 34 ans et sa mère, Ines La Gordo de Toledo, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Fernan Perez de Barroso. Elle est décédée à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mencia García de Sotomayor um 1270 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" 34 und ihre Mutter Ines La Gordo de Toledo 40. Sie hatte mit Fernan Perez de Barroso mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mencia García de Sotomayor è nata il circa 1270 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, sua padre, García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR", aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Ines La Gordo de Toledo, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Fernan Perez de Barroso. Morì nel Spagna.

ja.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España: スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレド
ja.Toledo, Castille-La Mancha, España: スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレド
ja.of, New Castile, Spain: スペインニュー カスティル
ja.lifeSummary: Mencia García de Sotomayorが約1270年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"は34歳，母Ines La Gordo de Toledoは40歳であった。彼女はFernan Perez de Barrosoとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女はスペインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mencia García de Sotomayor(이)가 대략 1270년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ines La Gordo de Toledo(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Fernan Perez de Barroso(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스페인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mencia García de Sotomayor nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR", tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Ines La Gordo de Toledo, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Fernan Perez de Barroso. Ela faleceu em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mencia García de Sotomayor родилась около 1270 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, её отцу по имени García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Ines La Gordo de Toledo, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Fernan Perez de Barroso. Она умерла в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mencia García de Sotomayor nació aproximadamente 1270, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR", tenía 34 años y su mamá, Ines La Gordo de Toledo, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Fernan Perez de Barroso. Murió en España.
